description: Account for the export of flax to Sicily. Around 1035. Also mentions camphor, textiles, as well as details about payments. It seems like it is mainly deals with people in Tripoli, Libya. T-S J1.54, CUL Or.1080 J291, BL OR5554A.53-54r (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 2, #136) VMR
description_he: חשבון על יצוא פשתן לסיציליה, כ-1035, מזכיר גם קמפור, טקסטיל ותשלומים, עוסק בעיקר באנשים בטריפולי
